name: Newsletter
tagline: Keeping every member informed, inspired, and connected to what matters most.
overview: The Newsletter committee produces and distributes E100's official monthly newsletter — the corporate voice of the organization. Published on the 30th or 31st of each month from August through May, the Newsletter pulls content from everything posted to Instagram and LinkedIn that month and delivers it to 16,000+ subscribers. Jordan Frank leads the issue. Brooks Baptiste and Ashton Edmunds support with Mailchimp production.
